questionHtml: Find the number of smoothies sold when the profit is maximized.
markschemeHtml:
attempt to substitute their x-value into equation for n          (M1)

n=40 000402

=25          A1

 

Note: Given the nature of the function P, the local maximum is also the global maximum. This is often the case in examinations, but should not always be assumed.

[2 marks]
